Biomass

Abby Lewis

2026-02-23

Plot biomass

df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = chamber_ref, y = Above.g.m2)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_grid(`Measurement type` ~ Year)

df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = chamber_ref, y = SCAM.g.m2)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_grid(`Measurement type` ~ Year)

df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = chamber_ref, y = DISP.g.m2)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_grid(`Measurement type` ~ Year)

df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = chamber_ref, y = SPPA.g.m2)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_grid(`Measurement type` ~ Year)

df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = chamber_ref, y = SPPA.g.m2 + DISP.g.m2)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_grid(`Measurement type` ~ Year)

df %>%
  pivot_longer(c(SPPA.g.m2, DISP.g.m2, SCAM.g.m2)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = chamber_ref, y = value, fill = name)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_grid(`Measurement type` ~ Year)

df %>%
  pivot_longer(c(SPPA.g.m2, DISP.g.m2, SCAM.g.m2)) %>%
  mutate(name = ifelse(name %in% c("SPPA.g.m2", "DISP.g.m2"),
    "grass", "sedge"
  )) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = chamber_ref, y = value, fill = name)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_grid(`Measurement type` ~ Year)

Plot stem characteristics

stem_sum <- stems %>%
  group_by(chamber_ref, `Measurement type`, Year) %>%
  summarize(
    u_height = mean(Total_Height, na.rm = T),
    med_height = median(Total_Height, na.rm = T),
    sd_height = sd(Total_Height, na.rm = T),
    u_width = mean(Width, na.rm = T),
    med_width = median(Width, na.rm = T),
    sd_width = sd(Width, na.rm = T),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

stems %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = chamber_ref)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(y = Total_Height)) +
  facet_grid(`Measurement type` ~ Year)
## Warning: Removed 367 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_boxplot()`).

stems %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = chamber_ref)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(y = Width)) +
  facet_grid(`Measurement type` ~ Year)
## Warning: Removed 367 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_boxplot()`).

Plot stem counts

counts %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = chamber_ref, y = Count)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_grid(`Measurement type` ~ Year)
